attributes.action: All MPs to be randomly breathalysed before entering House of Commons.
attributes.additional_details:
Totally unacceptable for an MP to turn up for work under the influence of alcohol. 
This is true for any work in the UK.
attributes.background:
A random breathalyser test should be taken while House of Commons is in operation. 
A limit of 50 mg of alcohol per 100 ml of blood is max permissible. 
Any MP found above that limit will be deemed unfit for duties and banned for a month.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Mandate alcohol breathalyser and drug swab tests in House of Commons
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/768899
